buildCommand: pnpm prisma:generate && if [ "$VERCEL_ENV" = "production" ]; then pnpm db:migrate; elif [ "$VERCEL_ENV" != "development" ]; then if [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then pnpm db:migrate || echo 'Skipping prisma migrate deploy (preview failure tolerated)'; else echo 'Skipping prisma migrate deploy (missing DATABASE_URL)'; fi; fi && pnpm build
